headline: Declaration of Voting Results by Philip Morris
summary: On May 8, 2026, Philip Morris International Inc. announced that it held its annual meeting of stockholders on May 6, 2026, and declared voting results. Accordingly, the shareholders did not approve...

headline: Philip Morris International’s Moira Gilchrist Positions Human Judgment as a Critical Leadership Advantage Amid Rapid AI Adoption at Wall Street Journal Forum
summary: STAMFORD, CT, May 08, 2026--Philip Morris International’s (PMI) (NYSE:PM) Chief Global Communications Officer, Moira Gilchrist, joined global thought leaders at The Wall Street Journal’s Future of Everything conference in New York to examine why human cognition—judgment, context, creativity, and ethical reasoning—is becoming the most valuable asset in an age of artificial intelligence.
